files.business_intent: Authoritative type definitions for all probe types, elements, and the UITestProbe interface. Single source of truth imported by TypeScript SDKs.
JSON Schema for the ProbeElement model with 15 attributes, conditional schemas for data-container and media type extensions, and all $defs for sub-objects.
JSON Schema for the ProbeAPI request/response protocol covering all 6 primitives plus hierarchy and platform context methods.
Built-in device presets (11 devices: iPhone SE/15 Pro, iPad Air/Pro 12, Pixel 8, Galaxy S24/Tab S9/Fold, MacBook Air 13, Desktop 1080p/1440p) for platform matrix testing.

Main WebProbe class implementing full UITestProbe interface. Composes all 6 collectors, handles lifecycle (construct/destroy), exposes as window.__probe__. Implements hierarchy methods, platform context auto-detection, snapshot/diff, and delegates actions.

Parses data-probe-* HTML attributes from DOM elements into ProbeElement structures. Handles source shorthand (GET /api/url), linkage JSON arrays, accessibility from ARIA, data fields, session, animation.

Maintains live registry of ProbeElements keyed by probe ID. Scans DOM via querySelectorAll, registers with layout from getBoundingClientRect, uses MutationObserver for dynamic add/remove of probe elements.

Watches data-probe-state attribute mutations via MutationObserver. Emits state-change events to EventStream. Provides promise-based waitForState() for test synchronization and onStateChange() subscriptions.

Central event bus with typed pub/sub (state-change, source-update, layout-change, interaction, network-request). Supports global/type/element-scoped listeners, history buffer, promise-based waitFor() with predicate and timeout.

Intercepts fetch() and XMLHttpRequest to correlate network requests with data-probe-source annotated elements. Tracks URL, method, status, responseTime. Maintains network log and provides waitForSource().
Layout metrics via getBoundingClientRect, IntersectionObserver for visibility tracking, PerformanceObserver for render timing. Detects element overlaps by computing bounding rect intersection areas.

Semantic action dispatch with 5-point pre-checks (exists, visible, enabled, not busy, option exists). Dispatches real DOM events for click/dblclick/contextmenu/hover/focus/type/fill/select/check/scroll/drag/shortcuts/navigate. Implements verifyLinkage() and actAndWait() composite operations.
Package entry point. Re-exports WebProbe, all collectors, parser, dispatcher, and spec types.
IIFE bundle entry point for Playwright injection. Creates WebProbe with config from window.__probeConfig__, defers DOM scan until DOMContentLoaded.
esbuild script producing dist/probe-bundle.js IIFE for browser injection.
Flutter library barrel export for all probe types, widget, binding, observers, and dispatcher.
Flutter port of core types: ProbeType (7 values), LinkageEffect (6 values), LinkagePath, DeviceProfile, PlatformContext, ProbeElement (15 fields).
ProbeWidget StatelessWidget that wraps child with Semantics metadata (identifier, label, value, hint) encoding probe type and source.

ProbeBinding extends WidgetsFlutterBinding. Scans widget tree for ProbeWidget instances, extracts bounding box from RenderBox, walks ancestor chain for parent ID, provides query/queryAll/waitForState.
StateObserver using persistent frame callbacks to diff probe state maps. Emits ProbeStateEvent stream with previous/current values. Provides waitForEvent() with timeout.

SourceTracker intercepts Dart HttpClient via HttpOverrides. Wraps all HTTP methods (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE/PATCH/HEAD) with TrackedHttpClient and TrackedHttpClientRequest to capture timing and status. Matches URLs to probe source patterns.

ActionDispatcher with pre-checks (exists, visible, enabled, type). tap/fill/select delegate actual interaction to WidgetTester. actAndWait polls for state change. verifyLinkage checks all targets exist and are visible.
Swift port of core types: ProbeType (7 cases), LinkageEffect (6 cases), LinkagePath, DeviceProfile, PlatformContext, ProbeElement (15 properties). All Codable and Sendable.

SwiftUI ViewModifiers (ProbeIdModifier, ProbeTypeModifier, ProbeStateModifier, ProbeSourceModifier, ProbeLinkageModifier) and View extensions (.probeId(), .probeType(), .probeState(), .probeSource(), .probeLinkage()). Encodes metadata into accessibility properties.

Singleton ProbeRegistry scans UIKit view hierarchy (UIWindowScene windows). Parses accessibility hints for type/source/linkage, accessibility values for state, computes bounds/visibility/enabled from UIView properties, maps accessibility traits to role strings, builds PlatformContext.

ActionDispatcher with pre-checks, tap (UIControl.sendActions or accessibilityActivate), fill (UITextField.insertText / UITextView.text), select (UISegmentedControl/UIPickerView), actAndWait with polling, verifyLinkage with effect-specific verification (navigate/toggle/refresh/submit/filter/overlay).
Kotlin port of core types: ProbeType (7 values), LinkageEffect (6 values), LinkagePath sealed class with Simple/Conditional variants, DeviceProfile, PlatformContext, ProbeElement (15 properties).
Custom SemanticsPropertyKeys and Modifier extensions for Compose: probeId, probeType, probeState, probeSource, probeLinkage. Each stores structured data in the semantics tree.

Walks Compose SemanticsNode tree via rootNodeProvider. Extracts probe properties, bounds, accessibility info (ContentDescription, Role, Disabled, Text), computes visibility from isPlaced. Singleton + instance pattern.

ActionDispatcher using ActionPerformer interface for platform actions. Pre-check with type validation. tap/fill/select via performer. actAndWait with coroutine withTimeoutOrNull. verifyLinkage compares before/after snapshots per effect type.

C# record types matching the spec's 9-type ProbeType enum. Complete ProbeElement with all 15 attributes. Full sub-record hierarchy: StateInfo, DataInfo, SourceInfo, LinkageInfo/Target, 6 LinkagePath variants (DirectPath, ApiPath, etc.), LayoutInfo, ShortcutInfo, AnimationInfo, LocaleInfo, ThemeInfo, SessionInfo, PlatformContext, DeviceProfile.
Platform-agnostic interface for probe registries: Scan, Query, QueryAll, QueryPage, QueryChildren, QueryDescendants, IsEffectivelyVisible. PageSummary record.
Shared parsing logic for annotation strings: ParseProbeType, ParseSource (method+url), ParseLinkage (pipe-delimited targets with path types), ParseLinkagePath, ParseChildren.

Abstract base for action dispatchers. PreFlightCheck (exists, visible, enabled, not busy). ActAndWait parses action string, dispatches, polls for state. VerifyLinkage tracks direct/chained/API effects with timing. ProbeActionException.

WPF IProbeRegistry implementation. Walks VisualTreeHelper, reads Probe DependencyProperties, computes layout from UIElement.RenderSize, refresh-on-query pattern, wildcard children matching, ancestor-walk visibility check.
WinForms IProbeRegistry implementation. Discovers controls from ProbeExtenderProvider, walks Control tree for parent assignment, refresh-on-query, wildcard children, parent-walk visibility.
MAUI/WinUI IProbeRegistry implementation. Walks Layout/ContentView/ContentPage/ScrollView trees, reads Probe BindableProperties, same refresh/wildcard/visibility patterns.

RNProbe main class implementing UITestProbe interface for React Native. Inline type definitions matching spec. Composes ElementRegistry, SourceTracker, ActionDispatcher. All 6 primitives + hierarchy + platform context with device presets.
useProbe() React hook serializing probe metadata into testID + accessibilityLabel + accessibilityHint. withProbe() HOC for class components. ProbeProps and NativeProbeProps interfaces.
Self-registration element registry for React Native. Components register via useProbe hook side-effect. query, queryAll, queryPage, queryChildren, queryDescendants, isEffectivelyVisible.
Network interceptor patching fetch/XHR. Source URL binding registration. Event-driven waitForRequest with URL pattern matching. Full network log with element correlation.
Action dispatcher for RN with pre-flight checks, tap/type/fill/select/scrollTo. State change listeners. actAndWait and verifyLinkage with timeout-based waiting.
Loads pre-built IIFE bundle from sdk/web/dist/probe-bundle.js and injects via page.addInitScript(). Configurable autoScan and interceptNetwork options.

ProbePage wrapper providing typed async methods for all UITestProbe operations via page.evaluate(). Covers all 6 primitives, hierarchy, composite operations (snapshot, diff, verifyLinkage, actAndWait).
Custom Playwright expect matchers: toHaveProbeState (with retry timeout loop), toHaveProbeData (deep partial field matching), toBeEffectivelyVisible (ancestor chain check).
ProbeTester extension on WidgetTester. query/queryAll, waitForPageReady (pumpAndSettle + state stability), actAndWait (tap finder then poll), setDevice (surface size + pixel ratio), runAcrossDevices.

XCTest integration wrapping XCUIApplication. query via accessibility identifier + hint parsing, waitForPageReady polling, actAndWait tap+poll, setDevice. Extension on XCUIApplication for .probe accessor.

Compose test integration. ProbeTestRule wraps ComposeTestRule, wires rootNodeProvider to semantics root, provides ActionPerformer bridge. query/queryAll, waitForPageReady, actAndWait, setDevice, runAcrossDevices. hasProbeId() SemanticsMatcher.

Detox integration. ProbeDevice wraps Detox device APIs. Parses accessibilityHint JSON for probe metadata. query/queryAll, waitForPageReady, waitForState, actAndWait, verifyLinkage, isEffectivelyVisible, setDevice, runAcrossDevices, getSource.
CLI entry point using Commander.js. Registers 3 subcommands (instrument, validate, report) with options for framework, dir, patterns, dry-run, strict mode, output format.

Scans source files across 8 frameworks, identifies key UI controls (per-framework control sets), adds probe annotations (data-probe-*, ProbeWidget wrappers, .probeId() modifiers, XAML attached properties). 3 ID strategies: semantic, path, counter. Supports dry-run.

Validates probe annotations: duplicate IDs, missing type, invalid type, missing source on data-container, missing state on interactive elements, orphan linkage targets, circular linkage detection (DFS), unreachable elements (no parent path to page root).

Generates coverage reports in text/JSON/HTML. Scans files for controls and annotations, computes per-page and per-type coverage percentages, identifies missing annotations. HTML report includes styled dashboard with coverage bars.
